overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character descends from a covered walkway through futuristic plazas and streets lined with holographic billboards and towering skyscrapers, eventually navigating through covered passages and emerging into crowded open areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian ramp with holographic advertising

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs toward plaza level
approaching open plaza area at bottom of ramp

agents.ego_description: walking down a covered ramp with wet reflective surfaces, passing large holographic billboards for Delamain and EEZY Recipe

entered.detail: large holographic advertisement for Delamain AI taxi service on left wall
bright billboard advertising EEZY RECIPE with food imagery spanning the walkway
vertical digital poster with pink neon character art on left railing
enclosed walkway with metal railings and overhead cover creating a tunnel effect

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian ramp adorned with bright holographic billboards. The wet concrete reflects the neon advertisements as the character descends stairs toward an open area below.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food stalls and neon storefronts

events.description: exits covered ramp into open plaza with food vendors
turns right toward main city street with skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza with neon-lit food stalls, passing pedestrians and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting at white outdoor table near food stall
pedestrian in checkered pants walking across the plaza

entered.detail: food vendor stall with bright cyan neon lighting and menu displays
white plastic chairs and tables arranged for outdoor dining
building facade covered in pink and purple neon signage with Japanese characters
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered ramp into an open plaza, the character moves through an area with cyan-lit food stalls and pink neon storefronts. Pedestrians occupy outdoor seating while the character turns toward the towering skyscrapers visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with towering skyscrapers and transit infrastructure

events.description: passing a bus shelter and transit stop on the right side
approaching entrance to covered walkway with glass roof structure

agents.ego_description: walking along a city street with towering neon-lit skyscrapers, passing bus stops and street furniture while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: glass and metal transit shelter with illuminated advertisements
large-scale holographic projections on the facades of distant skyscrapers
tall street light casting greenish glow on the wet pavement
elevated transit infrastructure with glass panels and metal framework

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a city sidewalk flanked by towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. A bus shelter and transit infrastructure line the right side as the character approaches a covered walkway entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass roof and commercial signage

events.description: enters covered walkway with glass roof and structural beams
passing under darker section illuminated by CANTEEN sign and storefront lights

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered walkway with glass roof structure, passing illuminated storefronts including a CANTEEN and various commercial posters

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction through the corridor

entered.detail: geometric glass and metal roof structure allowing limited light through
large illuminated sign reading CANTEEN above a storefront entrance
vertical digital advertising displays showing various products
large planters with greenery lining the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered walkway with a geometric glass roof, the character moves through a darker corridor illuminated by storefront signs including a prominent CANTEEN. Commercial posters and potted plants line the sides as the character follows another pedestrian toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with crowds and large building entrances

events.description: exits covered walkway into large open plaza with palm trees
navigating through denser crowd near building entrance

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway into a larger open plaza with palm trees and more pedestrians, approaching a building entrance with security presence

notable_agents.action: security personnel or official with glowing red helmet light standing near entrance
group of pedestrians walking together across the plaza

entered.detail: large open paved area with space for crowds and events
tropical palm trees planted in the plaza providing sparse vegetation
large illuminated entrance to a major building with glass doors
massive vertical screen displaying advertisements on the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a spacious open plaza filled with palm trees and a moderate crowd. A large building entrance with security personnel lies ahead, while massive digital billboards illuminate the right side of the area as the character navigates through the gathering.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from narrow covered ramps into expansive, neon-lit plazas. It begins on a pedestrian ramp where holographic billboards reflect off wet concrete as the character descends stairs toward the city level. As the character emerges into an open plaza, the environment shifts to a vibrant hub of cyan-lit food stalls and pink storefronts before moving along a sidewalk flanked by towering skyscrapers and transit infrastructure. The scene then narrows as the camera enters a geometric glass walkway, passing through a darker corridor lined with commercial posters and a canteen sign. Finally, the path opens up once more into a spacious plaza filled with palm trees and crowds, moving toward a secure building entrance under the glow of massive digital billboards.
